critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_005 (Run 3)

1. HARDWARE UPGRADE DISTRIBUTION SHIFT: 2023 hardware upgrade changed slice thickness defaults and reconstruction algorithm — both material determinants of deep learning nodule detection performance. Validation data is from pre-upgrade hardware. Unvalidated distribution shift for all prospective deployment studies.

2. AUTONOMOUS RADIOLOGICAL REPORTING LIABILITY: Model-only reports without radiologist sign-off are outside standard of care and create uninsured malpractice exposure. Insurer not consulted.

3. RETROSPECTIVE SENSITIVITY OVERESTIMATED ON ARCHIVED STUDIES: PACS archive over-represents significant findings. Sensitivity 0.94 likely overestimates prospective performance in lower-prevalence case mix.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_005 (Run 3)

All three valid. CONCEDE on all three. Deployment as proposed is inappropriate. Prospective hardware validation and human-in-the-loop workflow are required.
